sections.title: Timeline
sections.body_markdown:
**All times UTC.**

- **T+0** — Pager: elevated error rate on **checkouts** (`POST /api/v1/checkout`) — **@oncall** paged.
- **T+12m** — **Rollback** completed to `release/1.2.0`; error rate returned to baseline.
- **T+45m** — Customer comms in **#incidents-2026-04-22**; status page updated.
- **T+3h** — Blameless retro scheduled; postmortem owner **@eli**.

sections.title: Root cause
sections.body_markdown:
- **RC:** **Null** in tax calculation when `region` missing — defensive guard omitted in **PR-789**.
- **Contributing:** **E2E** did not cover **empty region**; **canary** traffic sample too narrow to catch edge store configs.

sections.title: What went well
sections.body_markdown:
- **Rollback** completed within **SLO**; runbook steps matched production.
- **Comms** lead rotated daily summary without duplicating on-call triage.
- **Customer impact** contained to **EU** stores during low-traffic window.

sections.title: What to improve
sections.body_markdown:
- **Canary** gating: add **synthetic** checkout with empty `region` before 100% promote.
- **On-call** runbook: add **one-click** link to last known good deploy artifact.

sections.title: Action items
sections.body_markdown:
| Item | Owner | Due |
|------|-------|-----|
| Add E2E for empty `region` | @dana | 2026-05-05 |
| Update canary gate checklist | @sam | 2026-05-02 |
| Publish blameless retro notes | @eli | 2026-05-01 |
